title: Hosted PM Intake Parity Executor Dispatch Binder
objective: Refresh the hosted PM intake parity dispatch surface after PM Lane 075 so an authenticated external Codex or Claude Code executor can select and execute the existing Vercel and/or Render hosted lanes without Jason serving as the technical relay.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Hosted Parity Coordinator / AI Orchestration Dispatch Author

current_source_floor.meaning: Current local and origin clean-main after PM Lane 075 local PM intake quick jump rail promotion. Hosted executors should validate against this commit or a later clean-main commit.

current_evidence: PM Lane 041 split hosted parity into Vercel operations-web promotion and Render mutation-seam redeploy/classification lanes.
PM Lane 042 created the hosted executor closeout template.
PM Lane 044 added /pm-review/import-intake to hosted route and hosted PM intake proof expectations.
PM Lane 075 moved the local PM Intake Quick Jump Rail near the top of /pm-review/import-intake, but did not change hosted parity requirements.
Hosted operations-web still needs authenticated Vercel promotion before /pm-review/import-approval-readiness and /pm-review/import-intake can be claimed hosted-current.
Hosted mutation-seam still needs authenticated Render redeploy or blocker classification before the four current PM intake reads can be claimed hosted-current.
The coordinator workspace still must not claim hosted parity without returned executor closeouts or green hosted smoke proof.

dispatch_targets.goal: Promote current operations-web to the existing https://operations.apexpowerops.com production alias so /pm-review/import-approval-readiness and /pm-review/import-intake are hosted.
Redeploy the existing apex-platform-mutation-seam service from current clean-main or classify why hosted PM intake reads remain missing.

allowed_actions: Author a current top-level hosted parity dispatch handoff.
Author a current copy/paste executor prompt that routes authenticated executors to PM Lane 041A and/or PM Lane 041B.
Refresh the PM Lane 041 dual-executor dispatch board with the PM Lane 076 wrapper.
Refresh the hosted executor closeout template label so PM Lane 076-selected closeouts are explicitly covered.
Update PM lane operating docs and PROJECT_STATUS.md.
Use a read-only sidecar scout to review the dispatch scope.
Validate packet JSON, markdown references, and diff cleanliness.
Commit, push, and restore Olares host parity after publication.
not_allowed: No Vercel promotion from this unauthenticated coordinator workspace.
No Render redeploy from this unauthenticated coordinator workspace.
No issue, task, workpackage, project, apparatus, durable field record, production tracking write, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 076|2026-05-15-pm-lane-076|cb1f10b83bbd61664be8eea7df0516a3d912d21e" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents/handoffs ops/agents/packets/draft
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar recommended a governance-only dual hosted executor dispatch readiness binder that packages PM Lane 041A, PM Lane 041B, and the PM Lane 042 closeout template without product code, hosted actions, Supabase writes, schema changes, or parity claims.
